data.title: AscendEX will launch Avail (AVAIL)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Avail (AVAIL) at 20:00 on February 18, opening the AVAIL/USDT trading pair, and deposits are now open.

data.title: BitMart will launch SHELL, GPS and BROCCOLI perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart will launch MyShell (SHELL), GoPlus Security (GPS) and CZ'S Dog (BROCCOLI) perpetual contracts at 17:00 (UTC+8) on February 18, 2025. At that time, SHELL/USDT, GPS/USDT and ROCCOLI/USDT trading pairs will be opened. SHELL and GPS support up to 20 times leverage, and BROCCOLI supports up to 50 times leverage.

data.title: ACH rose above 0.033 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 25.82%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that ACH rose above 0.033 USDT and is currently trading at 0.03353 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 25.82%.

data.title: Poll: Japan's GDP growth rate will accelerate to 1.3% in 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the Nikkei Chinese website, the results of the forecasts of Japan's gross domestic product (GDP) by 10 private economists interviewed showed that the average forecast for 2025, excluding the impact of price changes, actually increased by 1.3% over the previous year. Personal consumption will pick up and equipment investment will also increase. However, if domestic prices in Japan continue to rise or the overseas economy slows down further, it may have a negative impact on the Japanese economy. (Jinshi)

data.title: Senior UN official urges study on whether cryptocurrencies can help human development
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Kanni Wignaraja, assistant secretary-general of the United Nations, said on Monday that Bitcoin and Ethereum have gained attention as alternative investments, and the overall market value of cryptocurrencies peaked at $3.9 trillion in December last year. Given this huge pool of funds, she suggested investigating whether a small portion of the wealth could be repurposed to support education, health care, skills development and job creation.
Wignaraja called for a new regulatory approach. She stressed that cryptocurrencies need to support human development without endangering financial stability. It is also recommended that development organizations test cryptocurrency funds under strict safeguards to assess their impact.
Wignaraja pointed out that CBDC trials are underway in several Asian countries, and digital currencies provide a safe alternative to cash. CBDC can help bring unbanked people into the formal financial system, which can promote economic inclusion and expand access to financial services.
In addition, she believes that the transparency of blockchain can enhance accountability and curb corruption. To achieve this vision, she suggested that the United Nations Development Program (UNDP) support national institutions to establish a supervisory and risk management framework for CBDC.

data.title: Bitcoin Volatility Reaches Multi-Year Lows
data.description: According to Odaily, data from Glassnode reveals that Bitcoin's two-week realized volatility has decreased to an annualized rate of 32%, marking one of the lowest levels in recent years. Additionally, the one-month implied volatility for options, which reflects market expectations for four-week volatility, has fallen below an annualized rate of 50%, also reaching one of the lowest points in years.

data.title: Hackers stole the Saudi Legal Conference X account and pretended to be the Saudi Crown Prince to promote Memecoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Saudi Law Conference's X account was stolen yesterday and launched the Meme coin KSA in the name of Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.
However, analysts pointed out that the token lacks clear practicality, token economics and official support, which aroused people's suspicion. Subsequently, the Saudi Law Conference officially confirmed that the X account was stolen and released the above false news.

data.title: Kuande Investments responds to former employee's comments: the content is untrue
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: A piece of news about "an employee of the well-known quantitative private equity firm Kuande Investment pointed out on a social platform that the company used brain-machine weapons to persecute company employees" continues to ferment in the private equity circle. As for the above "abstract" "accusations", Kuande Investment responded on February 18: "The company has noticed the inappropriate remarks about the company on the online platform. After verification, the publisher of the remarks did work for the company for a short period of time (joined the company in July 2022, and voluntarily resigned in early September of the same year, with a term of about 1 month). At present, the publisher has terminated the labor relationship with the company, and his remarks are personal behavior, and the content contains false and misleading information." (China Securities Taurus) 
Previously, a programmer named "hulezhi" sent 500 ETH to the black hole address to make a call on the chain, involving the boss of Kuande Investment Company using brain-machine weapons to persecute employees.

data.title: Controversy Surrounds Allegations Against Quantitative Private Equity Firm
data.description: According to Odaily, a controversy has emerged in the private equity sector following allegations made by a former employee of the well-known quantitative private equity firm, Kuande Investment. The employee claimed on social media that the company used 'brain-machine weapons' to persecute its staff. In response to these abstract accusations, Kuande Investment issued a statement on February 18, clarifying the situation. The company acknowledged the presence of inappropriate remarks about them on online platforms. They confirmed that the individual who made these statements was briefly employed by the company from July 2022 and voluntarily left in early September of the same year, serving for approximately one month. Kuande Investment emphasized that the individual is no longer associated with the company and that the statements made are personal opinions containing false and misleading information.

data.title: Solana Network Sees Significant Decline In Active Addresses
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analyst Ali reported on X that the number of active addresses on the Solana network has decreased significantly. The figures have dropped from 18.5 million in November last year to less than 8.4 million currently. This represents a decline of over 54% in the past four months.
